series_metadata.series_description: Spirituous liquor recrords, brand summaries and inventory are produced from computer tapes and transferred to microfilm. These are reports of regularly input information.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Retain in the office area for 10 years, then destroy. ; Electronic: Original tapes kept off site for 5 years, then erased., Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
